gitCommit.subject: WEBDEV-1475: revert axe-core a11y scan from nav-pages-sanity (defer for now)
gitCommit.body:
WEBDEV-1475: revert axe-core a11y scan from nav-pages-sanity (defer for now)

Remove the WCAG 2.1 AA scan that was running per-page in nav-pages-
sanity. The a11y signal was floods of color-contrast / link-name
violations across nearly every page, none of which the team is
positioned to triage in the current sprint.

Stripped:
  - import AxeBuilder from '@axe-core/playwright'
  - per-page axe scan block (try/catch around new AxeBuilder().analyze())
  - [A11Y x<n>] / [A11Y <impact>] log markers (downstream summarizer
    section will be empty until/unless a11y is re-enabled)

@axe-core/playwright stays in package.json — it's a small dep and we
may re-enable in a follow-up. No code references it now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
